summary: The diff implements all five requirements: backend deleteProductionEntry function (REQ-1), useDeleteProductionEntry hook (REQ-2), Delete button per row in ReportsViewer (REQ-3), Delete button in detail/modal view (REQ-4), and removal of login requirement (REQ-5). Evidence is present across backend/main.mo, frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsViewer.tsx, frontend/src/components/Header.tsx, and frontend/src/App.tsx.
